entry.title: Supostos manifestantes do assentamento 26 de Setembro colocam fogo em ônibus

link.title: Supostos manifestantes do assentamento 26 de Setembro colocam fogo em ônibus

entry.content:
Nesta quarta, a PMDF deu início a mais uma fase da Operação Pronto Emprego  para evitar novas ocupações. Leia mais no site do Correio: www.correiobraziliense.com.br
Imagens: Material cedido ao Correio
entry.summary: Nesta quarta, a PMDF deu início a mais uma fase da Operação Pronto Emprego para evitar novas ocupações. Leia mais no site do Correio: www.correiobraziliense.com.br Imagens: Material cedido ao Correio

entry.title: Radha Ashtami 2020: Radha Ashtami Shubh Muhurat राधा अष्टमी शुभ मुहूर्त Boldsky

link.title: Radha Ashtami 2020: Radha Ashtami Shubh Muhurat राधा अष्टमी शुभ मुहूर्त Boldsky

entry.content:
Radha Ashtami is celebrated on Ashtami Tithi of Shukla Paksha of Bhadrapada month. This time Radha Ashtami will be celebrated on Wednesday, 26 August 2020. The festival of Radha Ashtami is celebrated as the prakatya festival of Sri Radha Rani. Shri Radha Rani is considered to be the power of Lord Shri Krishna. Worship of Radha is considered incomplete without Lord Krishna. This time, many auspicious coincidences are happening on the day of Radha Ashtami. On this day you can worship Lord Shri Krishna and Radha ji.
भाद्रपद मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की अष्टमी तिथि को राधा अष्टमी मनाई जाती है. इस बार राधा अष्टमी 26 अगस्त 2020 दिन बुधवार को मनाई जाएगी. राधा अष्टमी का त्योहार श्री राधा रानी के प्राकट्य उत्सव के रूप में मनाया जाता है. राधाअष्टमी शुभ मुहूर्त में पूजा करने से उनकी विशेष कृपा प्राप्त होती है।
#Radhaashtami2020 #Radhaashtamishubhmuhurat
entry.summary: Radha Ashtami is celebrated on Ashtami Tithi of Shukla Paksha of Bhadrapada month. This time Radha Ashtami will be celebrated on Wednesday, 26 August 2020. The festival of Radha Ashtami is celebrated as the prakatya festival of Sri Radha Rani. Shri Radha Rani is considered to be the power of Lord Shri Krishna. Worship of Radha is considered incomplete without Lord Krishna. This time, many auspicious coincidences are happening on the day of Radha Ashtami. On this day you can worship Lord Shri Krishna and Radha ji. भाद्रपद मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की अष्टमी तिथि को राधा अष्टमी मनाई जाती है. इस बार राधा अष्टमी 26 अगस्त 2020 दिन बुधवार को मनाई जाएगी. राधा अष्टमी का त्योहार श्री राधा रानी के प्राकट्य उत्सव के रूप में मनाया जाता है. राधाअष्टमी शुभ मुहूर्त में पूजा करने से उनकी विशेष कृपा प्राप्त होती है। #Radhaashtami2020 #Radhaashtamishubhmuhurat

link.title: Los mejores bosques de España para disfrutar este otoño

entry.content: Hayedos, robledales, castañares… estas son las masas forestales a las que mejor les sienta la temporada de otoño.

entry.title: Battle Stand Up dan Roasting YUDHA VS BOAH, Siapakah yang Menang? - COMEDY LAB (PART 7)

link.title: Battle Stand Up dan Roasting YUDHA VS BOAH, Siapakah yang Menang? - COMEDY LAB (PART 7)

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Kali ini, Comedy Lab yang dipandu Bokir Bokir dan Gita Bhebhita kedatangan sejumlah bintang tamu, yakni Pandji Pragiwaksono, Yudha Ilham, dan Boah Sartika.
Karena Pandji merasa kurang dengan performance Yudha dan Boah, Pandji meminta mereka untuk me-roasting dirinya. Kira-kira apa mereka akan berani me-roasting Pandji?
______________________
KompasTV merilis sebuah program komedi baru untuk menemani penonton setia KompasTV, yaitu sebuah comedy show bersama para komika dengan mengeksplorasi Stand Up Comedy.
Suasana Comedy Lab bersifat chill dan intimate serta dengan suguhan komedi segar dan menghibur. Penampilan Stand Up Comedy ini dilakukan oleh komika-komika Indonesia dengan didampingi oleh Host Gita Bhebita dan Boris Bokir.
Bintang tamu yang hadir pun selalu berbeda setiap episodenya. Selanjutnya, variety show ini tayang setiap dua kali dalam seminggu dengan durasi satu jam.
Harapannya, Comedy Lab yang dikemas berbeda dengan eksplorasi bebas dari para komika dapat menjadi program hiburan alternatif yang dapat dinikmati bersama keluarga.
Comedy Lab tayang setiap hari Jumat pukul 22.00 WIB dan Minggu jam 18.00 WIB hanya di Kompas TV.
Jangan lupa untuk follow Instagram @comedylabkompastv dan jangan lupa subscribe channel YouTube Stand Up KompasTV ya!
#ComedyLab #Comlab #Komedi
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Kali ini, Comedy Lab yang dipandu Bokir Bokir dan Gita Bhebhita kedatangan sejumlah bintang tamu, yakni Pandji Pragiwaksono, Yudha Ilham, dan Boah Sartika. Karena Pandji merasa kurang dengan performance Yudha dan Boah, Pandji meminta mereka untuk me-roasting dirinya. Kira-kira apa mereka akan berani me-roasting Pandji? ______________________ KompasTV merilis sebuah program komedi baru untuk menemani penonton setia KompasTV, yaitu sebuah comedy show bersama para komika dengan mengeksplorasi Stand Up Comedy. Suasana Comedy Lab bersifat chill dan intimate serta dengan suguhan komedi segar dan menghibur. Penampilan Stand Up Comedy ini dilakukan oleh komika-komika Indonesia dengan didampingi oleh Host Gita Bhebita dan Boris Bokir. Bintang tamu yang hadir pun selalu berbeda setiap episodenya. Selanjutnya, variety show ini tayang setiap dua kali dalam seminggu dengan durasi satu jam. Harapannya, Comedy Lab yang dikemas berbeda dengan eksplorasi bebas dari para komika dapat menjadi program hiburan alternatif yang dapat dinikmati bersama keluarga. Comedy Lab tayang setiap hari Jumat pukul 22.00 WIB dan Minggu jam 18.00 WIB hanya di Kompas TV. Jangan lupa untuk follow Instagram @comedylabkompastv dan jangan lupa subscribe channel YouTube Stand Up KompasTV ya! #ComedyLab #Comlab #Komedi

entry.title: Guy Slips Through Narrow Gap Between Metal Bars of Mexico-U.S. Border Wall

link.title: Guy Slips Through Narrow Gap Between Metal Bars of Mexico-U.S. Border Wall

entry.content: This guy was at the Mexico-U.S border, checking out the series of vertical barriers between the two countries. He put his leg through the gap between two metal bars and then tried to slip his entire body through the narrow gap. To the amazement of his friends, he succeeded in doing so and slipped out of the gap to the other side of the wall.
entry.summary: This guy was at the Mexico-U.S border, checking out the series of vertical barriers between the two countries. He put his leg through the gap between two metal bars and then tried to slip his entire body through the narrow gap. To the amazement of his friends, he succeeded in doing so and slipped out of the gap to the other side of the wall.

entry.title: India-China border talks: Military options on table if talks fail, says CDS General Rawat

link.title: India-China border talks: Military options on table if talks fail, says CDS General Rawat

entry.content:
India’s Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) General Bipin Rawat said
a military option to deal with transgressions by the Chinese Army in Ladakh is on the table. “The military option to deal with the transgressions by the Chinese is still on but will be considered only if the talks at the diplomatic and military level fail,” CDS General Bipin Rawat said. For more, watch the full video.
entry.summary: India’s Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) General Bipin Rawat said a military option to deal with transgressions by the Chinese Army in Ladakh is on the table. “The military option to deal with the transgressions by the Chinese is still on but will be considered only if the talks at the diplomatic and military level fail,” CDS General Bipin Rawat said. For more, watch the full video.

entry.title: Castex : «Vivre avec le virus, c’est aussi se cultiver avec le virus»

link.title: Castex : «Vivre avec le virus, c’est aussi se cultiver avec le virus»

entry.content: Rentrée médiatique ce mercredi matin pour Jean Castex. Évolution de l’épidémie de Covid-19, plan de relance, dotation à la culture… Sur France Inter, le Premier ministre a annoncé une série de mesures pour convaincre que son gouvernement était prêt sur ces dossiers sensibles.
entry.summary: Rentrée médiatique ce mercredi matin pour Jean Castex. Évolution de l’épidémie de Covid-19, plan de relance, dotation à la culture… Sur France Inter, le Premier ministre a annoncé une série de mesures pour convaincre que son gouvernement était prêt sur ces dossiers sensibles.

entry.title: À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple

link.title: À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple

entry.content:
Serrage de main, bises, pas de masque: aucun geste barrière n’est respecté.
À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple
À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple
À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l'exemple
entry.summary: Serrage de main, bises, pas de masque: aucun geste barrière n’est respecté.À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l’exemple À la convention républicaine, Trump et son administration ont décidé de ne pas montrer l'exemple

entry.title: La Course by Le Tour avec FDJ - Highlights

link.title: La Course by Le Tour avec FDJ - Highlights

entry.content:
La 7e édition de La Course by Le Tour de France avec FDJ se jouera sur un parcours de 96 kilomètres avec départ et arrivée à Nice, pour la première fois avant l’entrée en action des coureurs du Tour de France.
Si les sprinteuses ne sont pas exclues des pronostics, le tracé choisi pour les dames offre aussi des opportunités pour des puncheuses capables de s’extraire à distance et de résister au retour du peloton jusqu’à la Promenade des Anglais.
The 7th edition of La Course by Le Tour de France avec FDJ will take place on a 96-kilometre course with the start and finish in Nice, for the first time before the Tour de France riders head into action.
While the sprinters cannot be ruled out, the route chosen for the ladies also offers opportunities for punchers capable of breaking away and resisting the return of the peloton just until the Promenade des Anglais.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: La 7e édition de La Course by Le Tour de France avec FDJ se jouera sur un parcours de 96 kilomètres avec départ et arrivée à Nice, pour la première fois avant l’entrée en action des coureurs du Tour de France. Si les sprinteuses ne sont pas exclues des pronostics, le tracé choisi pour les dames offre aussi des opportunités pour des puncheuses capables de s’extraire à distance et de résister au retour du peloton jusqu’à la Promenade des Anglais. The 7th edition of La Course by Le Tour de France avec FDJ will take place on a 96-kilometre course with the start and finish in Nice, for the first time before the Tour de France riders head into action. While the sprinters cannot be ruled out, the route chosen for the ladies also offers opportunities for punchers capable of breaking away and resisting the return of the peloton just until the Promenade des Anglais. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: Guion : «Des regrets de ne pas avoir tenu le score» - Foot - L1 - Reims

link.title: Guion : «Des regrets de ne pas avoir tenu le score» - Foot - L1 - Reims

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOT - David Guion, le coach de Reims, qui menait 2-0 à Monaco avant de concéder le match nul (2-2) ce dimanche, retient néanmoins l’aspect positif de la rencontre : avoir glané le premier point de la saison, qui plus est sur la pelouse de l’ASM.
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOT - David Guion, le coach de Reims, qui menait 2-0 à Monaco avant de concéder le match nul (2-2) ce dimanche, retient néanmoins l’aspect positif de la rencontre : avoir glané le premier point de la saison, qui plus est sur la pelouse de l’ASM.

entry.title: MIG 29 - smoking airshow display

link.title: MIG 29 - smoking airshow display

entry.content: This polish Mig29 smokes the guts out of it`s engines. Also does a nice Display with a lot of afterburner
entry.summary: This polish Mig29 smokes the guts out of it`s engines. Also does a nice Display with a lot of afterburner

entry.title: US Election 2020 : Ivanka Is More Fit To Be First Female President Than Kamala Harris - Donald Trump

link.title: US Election 2020 : Ivanka Is More Fit To Be First Female President Than Kamala Harris - Donald Trump

entry.content:
US president donald trump once again made sensational comments on democratic vice presidential candidate kamala harris. trump says that she is not competent and his daughter ivanka is better than her.
#USElection2020
#DonaldTrump
#KamalaHarris
#JoeBiden
#DonaldTrump
#Ivankatrump
#RepublicanParty
#elections2020USA
#democraticparty
#UnitedStates
అమెరికా అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికల పోరు దగ్గర పడుతున్న కొద్దీ మాటల తూటాలు పేలుతున్నాయి. ముఖ్యంగా ఇండో-జమైకాన్‌ మూలాలన్న డెమోక్రాట్‌ ఉపాధ్యక్ష అభ్యర్ధి కమలా హ్యారిస్‌పై రిపబ్లికన్‌ అధ్యక్ష అభ్యర్ధి డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్ మరోసారి నోరు పారేసుకున్నారు. అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికల రేసులో పోటీ పడేందుకు ఆమె సరిపోరని వ్యాఖ్యానించారు.
entry.summary: US president donald trump once again made sensational comments on democratic vice presidential candidate kamala harris. trump says that she is not competent and his daughter ivanka is better than her. #USElection2020 #DonaldTrump #KamalaHarris #JoeBiden #DonaldTrump #Ivankatrump #RepublicanParty #elections2020USA #democraticparty #UnitedStates అమెరికా అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికల పోరు దగ్గర పడుతున్న కొద్దీ మాటల తూటాలు పేలుతున్నాయి. ముఖ్యంగా ఇండో-జమైకాన్‌ మూలాలన్న డెమోక్రాట్‌ ఉపాధ్యక్ష అభ్యర్ధి కమలా హ్యారిస్‌పై రిపబ్లికన్‌ అధ్యక్ష అభ్యర్ధి డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్ మరోసారి నోరు పారేసుకున్నారు. అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికల రేసులో పోటీ పడేందుకు ఆమె సరిపోరని వ్యాఖ్యానించారు.

entry.title: No “Useless Girl” Cazzu Talks Feminism and Dinner With Poets: Watch Billboard

link.title: No “Useless Girl” Cazzu Talks Feminism and Dinner With Poets: Watch Billboard

entry.content: Cazzu sat down with Billboard’s Leila Cobo to answer five pivotal questions about her new album ‘Una Nina,’ feminism and dinners with poets.
entry.summary: Cazzu sat down with Billboard’s Leila Cobo to answer five pivotal questions about her new album ‘Una Nina,’ feminism and dinners with poets.

entry.title: Un garde-côte américain tire sur un requin s’approchant de baigneurs

link.title: Un garde-côte américain tire sur un requin s’approchant de baigneurs

entry.content:
C’est une scène digne des “Dents de la mer” qu’ont vécu ces garde-côtes américains ce mercredi 26 août.
Alors qu’ils naviguaient au milieu de l’océan pacifique, une partie de l’équipe décide de prendre une pause et de se baigner. Soudain, un membre de l’équipage resté sur le pont hurle “requin”.
entry.summary: C’est une scène digne des “Dents de la mer” qu’ont vécu ces garde-côtes américains ce mercredi 26 août. Alors qu’ils naviguaient au milieu de l’océan pacifique, une partie de l’équipe décide de prendre une pause et de se baigner. Soudain, un membre de l’équipage resté sur le pont hurle “requin”.

link.title: MIU404 #9 8月21日(金)放送分

entry.content: 桔梗(麻生久美子)の自宅に盗聴器が仕掛けられた一件が進展する中､主犯がエトリと繋がりのある辰井組の組員だったことが分かり､関係各所へのガサ入れが決行されるが…｡

entry.title: Neil Armstrong Death Anniversary: Inspiring Quotes by The First Man to Step on The Moon

link.title: Neil Armstrong Death Anniversary: Inspiring Quotes by The First Man to Step on The Moon

entry.content:
The name Neil Armstrong always reminds you of the first mission to moon. The NASA astronaut carved history by being the first man to step on the moon. He passed away at the age of 82 on August 25, 2012. On his death anniversary, we bring you famous and inspiring quotes by him which will make you to aim high.
#NeilArmstrong #DeathAnniversary #InspiringQuotes
Link:
Subscribe:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Instagram:
entry.summary: The name Neil Armstrong always reminds you of the first mission to moon. The NASA astronaut carved history by being the first man to step on the moon. He passed away at the age of 82 on August 25, 2012. On his death anniversary, we bring you famous and inspiring quotes by him which will make you to aim high. #NeilArmstrong #DeathAnniversary #InspiringQuotes Link: Subscribe: Facebook: Twitter: Instagram:

entry.title: Momentos en que hombre que lanzó café a joven llega a la fiscalía

link.title: Momentos en que hombre que lanzó café a joven llega a la fiscalía

entry.content: Fue interrogado la mañana de hoy en la Fiscalía del Distrito Nacional, Jazhiel Morel Tejeda, quien lanzó dos vasos de café caliente a una empleada de un food shop en una estación de combustibles.
entry.summary: Fue interrogado la mañana de hoy en la Fiscalía del Distrito Nacional, Jazhiel Morel Tejeda, quien lanzó dos vasos de café caliente a una empleada de un food shop en una estación de combustibles.

entry.title: Foule immense à Washington contre le racisme, 57 ans après le discours de Martin Luther King

link.title: Foule immense à Washington contre le racisme, 57 ans après le discours de Martin Luther King

entry.content:
Entre lassitude et colère, des milliers de personnes se rassemblaient vendredi au cœur de Washington pour réclamer la fin des violences policières contre la minorité noire après une série de bavures qui ont rouvert les plaies raciales de l’Amérique.
57 ans jour pour jour après l’emblématique discours du leader de la lutte pour les droits civiques Martin Luther King, “I have a dream”, les Américains étaient invités à marcher à nouveau sur la capitale fédérale pour réclamer l’égalité entre tous.
entry.summary: Entre lassitude et colère, des milliers de personnes se rassemblaient vendredi au cœur de Washington pour réclamer la fin des violences policières contre la minorité noire après une série de bavures qui ont rouvert les plaies raciales de l’Amérique. 57 ans jour pour jour après l’emblématique discours du leader de la lutte pour les droits civiques Martin Luther King, “I have a dream”, les Américains étaient invités à marcher à nouveau sur la capitale fédérale pour réclamer l’égalité entre tous.

entry.title: Dewas Building Collapse: Madhya Pradesh में 2 मंजिला मकान गिरा, मलबे में दबे कई लोग वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Dewas Building Collapse: Madhya Pradesh में 2 मंजिला मकान गिरा, मलबे में दबे कई लोग वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Two storey building collapsed in Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, many people buried under debris. Big news is coming out from Madhya Pradesh right now, where a two-storey building in Dewas has become grounded. This big accident has happened in the Red Gate area of ​​Dewas. According to the information, so far 6 people have been pulled out of the debris.
मध्य प्रदेश से इस वक्त बड़ी खबर सामने आ रही है जहां देवास में एक दो मंजिला इमारत जमींदोज हो गई है. देवास के लाल गेट इलाके में ये बड़ा हादसा हुआ है. जानकारी के मुताबिक, मलबे से अभी तक 6 लोगों को बाहर निकाला गया है.
#Dewas #MadhyaPradesh #BuildingCollapse
entry.summary: Two storey building collapsed in Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, many people buried under debris. Big news is coming out from Madhya Pradesh right now, where a two-storey building in Dewas has become grounded. This big accident has happened in the Red Gate area of ​​Dewas. According to the information, so far 6 people have been pulled out of the debris. मध्य प्रदेश से इस वक्त बड़ी खबर सामने आ रही है जहां देवास में एक दो मंजिला इमारत जमींदोज हो गई है. देवास के लाल गेट इलाके में ये बड़ा हादसा हुआ है. जानकारी के मुताबिक, मलबे से अभी तक 6 लोगों को बाहर निकाला गया है. #Dewas #MadhyaPradesh #BuildingCollapse

entry.title: Shefali Jariwala And Mika Singh Collaborate For A Secret Project

link.title: Shefali Jariwala And Mika Singh Collaborate For A Secret Project

entry.content: Dancing diva Shefali Jariwala and singer Mika Singh have collaborated on a remake of a hit song of the nineties, though they want to keep alive the suspense for fans and are not in the mood to reveal the name of the number yet. The duo recently shot for the music video for the song amidst the lockdown. Talking about the project, Shefali said, "Over the years I have got various offers for remixes and original songs, but nothing excited me. Mika and I have been friends for over a decade, and have wanted to do something together for a long time. It’s only during the lockdown when Mika sent me this song, I was immediately on board."
entry.summary: Dancing diva Shefali Jariwala and singer Mika Singh have collaborated on a remake of a hit song of the nineties, though they want to keep alive the suspense for fans and are not in the mood to reveal the name of the number yet. The duo recently shot for the music video for the song amidst the lockdown. Talking about the project, Shefali said, "Over the years I have got various offers for remixes and original songs, but nothing excited me. Mika and I have been friends for over a decade, and have wanted to do something together for a long time. It’s only during the lockdown when Mika sent me this song, I was immediately on board."

entry.title: Walk into Chennai’s Handloom Cafe and discover weaving with your coffee

link.title: Walk into Chennai’s Handloom Cafe and discover weaving with your coffee

entry.content: The cafe that was inaugurated on August 7, National Handloom Day, is an initiative by the state-run handloom cooperative to entice the younger generation to look at the concept of handloom with more understanding.
entry.summary: The cafe that was inaugurated on August 7, National Handloom Day, is an initiative by the state-run handloom cooperative to entice the younger generation to look at the concept of handloom with more understanding.

entry.title: Ni la colonisation ni l’esclavage n’ont enrichi l’Occident

link.title: Ni la colonisation ni l’esclavage n’ont enrichi l’Occident

entry.content: Marx prédisait l’appauvrissement des travailleurs soumis au capitalisme : l’invalidation de sa prophétie obligea Lénine à la réactualiser. L’embourgeoisement du prolétariat occidental fut alors attribué à l’impérialisme. En 1984, Jacques Marseille publiait un ouvrage remettant en question la profitabilité de la colonisation pour la France : sa thèse fut largement ignorée. Au XVIIIe siècle, les physiocrates Quesnay et Dupont de Nemours assimilent l’esclavage et la colonisation à des systèmes stériles.
entry.summary: Marx prédisait l’appauvrissement des travailleurs soumis au capitalisme : l’invalidation de sa prophétie obligea Lénine à la réactualiser. L’embourgeoisement du prolétariat occidental fut alors attribué à l’impérialisme. En 1984, Jacques Marseille publiait un ouvrage remettant en question la profitabilité de la colonisation pour la France : sa thèse fut largement ignorée. Au XVIIIe siècle, les physiocrates Quesnay et Dupont de Nemours assimilent l’esclavage et la colonisation à des systèmes stériles.
